versions.version_description: Fully complete and improved chord placement.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I close my eyes when I get too sad. [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I think thoughts that I know are bad. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Close my eyes and I count to ten. [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Hope its over when I open them. [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I want the things that I had before,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Like a Star Wars poster on my bedroom door. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I wish I could count to ten,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
make everything be wonderful again. [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Hope my Mom and I hope my Dad [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
figure out why they get so mad. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hear them scream, hear them fight. [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
They say bad words that make me want to cry. [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I close my eyes when I go to bed [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
and I dream of adventures that make me smile. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I feel better when I hear them say, [/tab]
[tab][ch]D5[/ch]
Everything will be wonderful some day.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch] 
Promises mean everything when you little and the   [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch] 
world so big. I just dont understand how [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch] 
you can smile with all those tears in your eyes [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
and tell me everything is wonderful now. [/tab]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       
e|--10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-10-7-|
B|---------------------------------------------------------|
G|---------------------------------------------------------|
D|---------------------------------------------------------|
A|---------------------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------------------|       [/tab]


[Verse]     
                                    
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                
Go to school and I run and play. [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                  
I tell the kids that its all O.K. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                      
I have to laugh so my friends dont know,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                             
when the bell rings I just dont wanna go home.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                  
I go to my room and I close my eyes, [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                     
I make believe that I have a new life. [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               
I do believe you when you say,[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                                      
Everything will be wonderful someday. [/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             
Promises mean everything when you're little and the   [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]          
world's so big, so big, I just don't understand how [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]             
you can smile with all those tears in your eyes [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
and tell me everything is wonderful now. [/tab]
